title: CourseMaster - Learning Management System
description: Comprehensive LMS featuring modular course architecture, automated Stripe payments, and an auto-graded quiz engine.
detailedDescription: CourseMaster is a sophisticated Learning Management System designed for scalable education delivery. It features a modular course architecture with multi-level lesson tracking, secure Stripe integration for automated enrollments via webhooks, and a robust auto-graded quiz system. The platform includes dedicated dashboards for Admins, Instructors, and Students with real-time analytics for revenue and progress tracking.
features: Secure Stripe Integration with Webhook Handling
challenges: Implementing complex webhook handling for automated course enrollment
Designing a flexible and scalable course/module/lesson hierarchy
Engineering a reliable auto-grading engine for diverse quiz types
Managing multi-role permissions across a shared platform
futurePlans: Expanding to mobile app using React Native

title: Royal Place - Hotel Management
description: A comprehensive hotel booking system with modern payment integration, real-time room availability, guest management, and an intuitive admin dashboard.
detailedDescription: Royal Place Hotel is a full-featured hotel management and booking platform built with modern web technologies. The system offers a seamless experience for both guests and administrators, featuring real-time room availability tracking, secure payment processing through Stripe, and instant booking confirmations via Socket.io. The platform includes an advanced admin dashboard for managing rooms, bookings, and guest information with comprehensive analytics and reporting capabilities.
features: Real-time room availability tracking with Socket.io
User authentication and authorization with JWT
Admin dashboard with analytics and reporting
Room management system with pricing and availability
challenges: Implementing real-time availability updates across multiple users
Handling race conditions for simultaneous bookings
Integrating Stripe payment webhooks securely
Optimizing database queries for performance
futurePlans: Adding multi-hotel support for chain management
Developing a dedicated guest mobile application

title: BugZero - AI-Powered Website Diagnostic
description: AI-powered web diagnostic system to analyze website performance, structure, and potential issues automatically.
detailedDescription: BugZero is an AI-powered automated website scanning engine designed to detect broken links, SEO problems, and performance bottlenecks. It features real-time report generation with structured, user-friendly diagnostic results to help developers optimize their web applications instantly through intelligent analysis.
features: Automated Scanning for Broken Links & SEO Issues
challenges: Integrating AI models for accurate website structural analysis
Developing a high-speed scanning engine for large-scale websites
Managing real-time data flow for instant report generation
Ensuring clean and actionable diagnostic output for non-technical users
futurePlans: Enhancing AI models for automated code fixing suggestions
Adding support for mobile web performance auditing

title: Jubok - Foundation Management
description: Comprehensive investment and donation management platform featuring RBAC, real-time updates, and multi-gateway payments.
detailedDescription: Jubok Foundation is an advanced multi-platform solution designed for large-scale investment and donation management. Built with a high-performance architecture, the system utilizes Next.js for the storefront and member portal, and NestJS for a scalable backend API. It features a sophisticated Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system, real-time activity tracking via Socket.io, and seamless financial operations through integrated payment gateways like SSLCommerz and Stripe.
features: Secure RBAC (Super Admin, Admin, Moderator, User)
challenges: Orchestrating complex financial transactions across disparate payment systems
Managing high-concurrency real-time notifications for thousands of members
Ensuring sub-second API responses through efficient Redis cache invalidation
Developing a flexible RBAC system to handle hierarchy-based data access

title: Learn Finity - E-Learning Platform
description: A modern, responsive e-learning platform with free and paid courses, authentication, and a lightning-fast user experience.
detailedDescription: Learn Finity is a robust education platform designed to democratize learning. It features a scalable course management system, interactive video lessons, and a comprehensive student progress tracker. Built with the MERN stack and enhanced with Next.js, it provides sub-second page transitions and optimized data fetching for a premium learning experience.
features: Dynamic course catalog with high-performance filtering
Secure enrollment and multi-currency payment system
Interactive Student Dashboard with progress tracking
Instructor Portal for curriculum & resource management
Integrated quiz engine and automated assessment
Certificate generation engine upon course completion
challenges: Optimizing complex video streaming and storage delivery
Implementing fine-grained content access control for memberships
Designing a scalable database schema for diverse educational content

title: Car Wash - Booking System
description: Modern car wash booking platform with service scheduling, real-time slot availability, payment integration, and customer management.
detailedDescription: A specialized booking engine tailored for car service centers. It automates the scheduling process, allowing customers to book specific time slots, choose various service packages, and pay online. The administrative backend provides a clear view of daily schedules, staff allocation, and revenue reports.
challenges: Optimizing slot scheduling algorithm to prevent overlaps
Implementing efficient real-time updates for slot availability
Creating an intuitive mobile-first booking flow

title: Agri - Management System
description: A simple agri management dashboard with analytics and real-time updates.
detailedDescription: A specialized dashboard for agricultural data management, helping farmers and organizations track crop health, weather patterns, and resource allocation. It translates complex sensor data into actionable visual insights.

title: Islamic - Learning Platform
description: Platform for online Islamic learning, with courses, user tracking, and analytics.
detailedDescription: An educational portal dedicated to Islamic studies, providing a structured curriculum, community forums, and progress tracking for students around the world.

title: Fitness - Tracker App
description: A web app for tracking workouts, goals, and health metrics.
detailedDescription: A comprehensive fitness companion that helps users set goals, log daily activities, and monitor their long-term health trends with real-time feedback and motivational alerts.

title: Academi - Education Platform
description: Education platform with course management and student dashboards.
detailedDescription: A versatile LMS designed for institutional use, supporting multiple roles like Admin, Teacher, and Student with dedicated dashboards and permissions.

title: Brand - Shop
description: A marketplace platform for eco-friendly products and services.
detailedDescription: A niche e-commerce platform curated for sustainable living. It provides a clean shopping interface for customers focused on reducing their environmental footprint.

title: Travel - Tips
description: Dashboard for managing multiple social media accounts and analytics.
detailedDescription: A centralized hub for social media managers to schedule posts, monitor engagement metrics, and respond to messages across various platforms from a single interface.

title: Froot - Delivery App
description: Delivery service platform for fresh fruits and groceries.
detailedDescription: A sleek, lightweight web interface for a fruit delivery startup, focusing on performance and user-friendly navigation for a primarily mobile audience.

title: Flower - Shop Platform
description: Platform for selling flowers online with payment integration.
detailedDescription: An elegant boutique flower shop website, designed to showcase floral arrangements with high-quality imagery and a simplified purchasing flow.

title: Gamer - Hub
description: A community platform for gamers to connect, share, and track tournaments.
detailedDescription: A dynamic landing page and community entry point for competitive gamers, featuring news updates, tournament schedules, and social connectivity points.
